district: SPECL. SCH. DST. ST. LOUIS CO.
title: Early Childhood Special Education Coordinator
notes: Special School District of St. Louis County (SSD) provides ECSE services to 1,300+ children ages 3-5 across 14 of 22 SLCo districts. Casey Wisdom listed as the ECSE Coordinator. Kathleen Vierod is also a key ECSE contact (314.989.8213). SSD is a SpEd-only service district; not a traditional district running its own Pre-K curriculum. May be lower-priority for Brightwheel ECE curriculum outreach since SSD partners with local districts who own Pre-K. Email needed -- check Apollo.io.

title: Director of Preschool
notes: Columbia Public Schools is one of MO's largest districts (~18K students). Operates Early Childhood Discovery Center at 2191 Smiley Lane. Strong target for ECE outreach. CPS runs MPP-funded preschool plus ECSE. Director of Preschool is the clearest decision-maker for ECE curriculum.

title: Superintendent
notes: FHSD operates 3 early childhood centers (Central School Road EC, Hackmann Road EC, plus full-day PreK at Becky-David, Fairmount, Henderson, Harvest Ridge Elementary). District has a Director of Curriculum & Assessment and Director of Elementary & Middle Schools, but specific Early Childhood Director name not surfaced in public web. Supt Mark Delaney named as fallback; ideal contact is the ECE Director or Director of Curriculum. Email pattern likely first.last@fhsdschools.org -- needs Apollo.io confirmation.

title: Director of Early Childhood
notes: LEADERSHIP TRANSITION: Dr. Ashley Deckelman (formerly principal of Willow Brook Elementary) named Director of Early Childhood effective July 1, 2026. Pattonville EC is at 2900 Adie Road, St. Ann. General EC email PattonvilleEC@psdr3.org confirmed -- direct email for Deckelman likely adeckelman@psdr3.org (needs Apollo confirmation). Strong outreach target during the transition.

title: Principal, Early Childhood Education
notes: LEADERSHIP TRANSITION: Kaitlyn McGovern named ECE Principal effective July 1, 2024. Lindbergh operates 2 EC centers (Main at 4814 S. Lindbergh Blvd; West at 9011 Robyn Rd). District has ~7,500 students. Email needed -- typical Lindbergh format is firstinitiallastname@lindberghschools.ws. Check Apollo.io.

title: Early Childhood Coordinator
notes: Ladue Early Childhood Center at 10890 Ladue Rd, St. Louis. Debbie Cohen is the district-level EC Coordinator; Stacy Carlock, Ed.D. is the LECC Center Director (on-site). For curriculum decisions, Cohen is the better fit. Email pattern likely first.last@ladueschools.net (needs Apollo confirmation).

title: Director of Early Learning
notes: Hired March 2022 to lead Affton Early Childhood Center (AECC) + Parents As Teachers. Affton alum (Class of 2013) with deep community ties. Directly responsible for ECE programming -- ideal Brightwheel contact.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Windsor C-1 (Imperial, Jefferson County) runs a Title I Preschool but no dedicated ECE Director identified publicly. Asst Supt Sherri Strauser is the curriculum/instruction lead -- best fit per priority order. District serves Imperial, Barnhart, Kimmswick. Email pattern likely strauser@windsorc1.com (needs Apollo).

title: Principal, Freda Markley Early Childhood Center
notes: Hickman Mills operates 2 EC centers (Freda Markley EC -- Principal Kacy Parker; John Sharp EC -- Principal Dr. Kimberly Shaw) plus PAT program. No district-level Director of EC identified -- principals own the program. For curriculum decisions across both centers, also consider Dept of Academic Services. Email format: firstname.lastname@hickmanmills.org (e.g., kacy.parker@hickmanmills.org -- needs verification).

title: Principal, Charlene Roscher Early Childhood Center
notes: Laura Oyler is Principal of the Charlene Roscher Early Childhood Center; Michelle Alexander is Asst Principal of Oak Grove Primary/ECC. District also has Asst Supt Dave MacLean overseeing curriculum. Email likely loyler@oakgrove.k12.mo.us (needs Apollo).

title: Early Childhood & PAT Director/Coordinator
notes: Sally Phillips leads Union R-XI Early Childhood Center + Parents As Teachers. EC office at 110 W. Springfield Ave, Union. Email format confirmed (firstinitial+lastname@unionrxi.org).

title: Superintendent

title: Superintendent

title: Superintendent

Email pattern likely kensminger@carthagetigers.org (needs Apollo).
